figures.caption: Figure 2: Deformation-aware training, from left to right: (a) the rest-space voxel grid (b) the warped deformed-space grid with a straight ray (c) the piecewise linear approximation in rest space (d) index x fed to the Eq. 1 encoder and MLP to predict geometric properties (a,b,c).
Figure 4: Comparison of deformation-aware predictions across two scenes. Top row: albedo prediction on the cat object. Bottom row: multi-material prediction on the dragon object.
